description_long: This object consists of an assortment of metal plumbing and pipe fittings, including straight pipes, elbow joints, T-joints, valves with handwheels, and various connectors. The components are arranged in parallel rows, with some pieces showing a rusted or aged metallic finish, while others appear darker, possibly painted or coated. The valves feature prominent circular handwheels and red lever handles, indicating their function for controlling fluid flow. The pipes and fittings vary in diameter and length, suggesting a collection suitable for a hardware store's plumbing section. The overall appearance is industrial, with visible threading and connection points on many pieces. The set is organized in a way that highlights the diversity of available hardware components.
description: A collection of assorted metal plumbing pipes, valves, and fittings, some rusted and some dark-coated, arranged in parallel rows. Features include handwheel valves, T-joints, and various connectors, typical of a hardware store's plumbing section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of pipes and the arrangement of valves and fittings in parallel rows, with handwheels and connectors clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the circular arrangement of fittings and the distinct color differences between rusted and dark-coated components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alignment of pipes and the backside of valves, with more emphasis on the straight pipe sections and less detail on the handwheels.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the ends of the pipes and the profile of the fittings, showing the depth and spacing between components.
attribute_storefront_layout: The exterior layout consists of multiple rows of plumbing hardware items arranged in parallel, with no visible entrances, windows, or display areas.
